steps.t: A thief stole supplies from the Agarnaith Ranger camp and fled into the swamp. You should follow the thief's trail.
The trail has led you to a young goblin standing by the path. You should confront the thief.
The goblin thief has run east, deeper into the swamp. You should chase after the thief!
The goblin has been carried off, but Rhadrog seems to have found his hideout nearby. You should find Viznak's hideout.
Faeron can be found at Viznak's hideout. You should talk to Faeron.
